hooks.command: [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: knowledge graph at graphify-out/. For focused questions, run `graphify query \"<question>\"` instead of scanning raw files."}}' || true

FILE=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('TargetFile',''))" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$FILE" in *project.yml) echo 'project.yml changed. Run xcodegen generate before Xcode verification.' ;; *Sources/SwooshTools/SwooshPermission.swift) echo 'Permission model changed. Update Docs/PermissionModel.md in the same change.' ;; esac
